_comment: Enterprise managed policy settings for Claude Code. This file takes precedence over user and project settings and CANNOT be overridden or disabled by a developer. That is what turns the security/privacy hooks from advisory-on-my-machine into non-bypassable org policy. Install it to the OS managed-settings path via settings/install.sh (run by IT/MDM). Hook paths assume the guardrails are installed at /usr/local/share/secure-dev-guardrails; install.sh keeps the two in sync.
